parameters.text:
= You are a smart assistant helping to analyze search results.
I will give you a list of search results. Each item includes:
- title
- description
- emphasized keywords
- url 
Your task is to:
1. Read all items.
2. Identify which one is the most suitable and best for post based on given title , description
3. Return **only the best result** in a clean and structured JSON format.

✅ Your output must follow this exact JSON structure:
{
"title": "...",
"description": "...",
"url": "...",
"reason": "Explain briefly why this result was selected over others.
}
Here is the list of search results:{{ $json.organicResultsString }}

=You are a professional social media assistant. I will give you a draft or idea, and your job is to rewrite it into a friendly, professional news-style post that is fully valid JSON, formatted as HTML for direct publishing. Input: title: {{ $json.pageTitle }} original context: {{ $json.content }} Your task: Rewrite the input into a clean, publish-ready news post using the structure below. Format the post as HTML, not Markdown. Use only plain text and standard HTML elements. Do not use emojis, smart quotes (“ ”), curly apostrophes (’), or any symbols that may break JSON. Escape any special characters as needed to maintain valid JSON (e.g., \n, \", etc.). Do not include any placeholders, instructions, or incomplete sections. Assume this will be directly published. Do not use backticks (`) anywhere in the response. HTML Template (for "Content" field):

Title goes here

Introductory paragraph
    list of 2–4 bullet points Paragraph referencing a real or hypothetical study ( for publication) Action steps to apply this insight: followed by a
      Closing reflection paragraph Final paragraph with hashtags Required Output Format: Respond with valid JSON only. No commentary. No explanation. json Copy Edit [ { "title": "Final, formatted title", "slug": "seo-friendly-slug-version-of-title", "description": "1-line summary of the post", "Content": "HTML content as string, all properly escaped for JSON" } ] ⚠️ Important: All string values must use double quotes and be properly escaped to avoid any JSON parsing issues. No invalid characters. No Markdown. Only return the JSON array shown above.

=You are a content classifier.
I will provide you wiYou are a content classifier.
I will provide you with:

A list of categories

A post containing a title and content

Your task:

Choose the most appropriate category from the list based on the post content and title.

If no strong match is found, choose one randomly from the list.



Return JSON in the following format:th:

A list of categories  {{ $json.output }}

A post containing a title and content  
postTitle:{{ $json.post[0].title }}
postId:{{ $json.post[0].id }}

Choose the most appropriate category from the list based on the post content and title.

If no strong match is found, choose one randomly from the list.


postId = post.id
post title: post.slug

Return JSON in the following format:

Return JSON in the following format:

{
  "post_id": "post Id"
  "category" : "select one category with  id and category name"
}
